## Task

What small improvement should be made?

## Suggested files

List the likely files or docs to inspect.

## Acceptance checks

- [ ] The change keeps HK NDVI examples as golden regression evidence.
- [ ] Claims distinguish implemented, verified, partial, and planned capability.
- [ ] No credentials, token paths, or local private paths are committed.
- [ ] Relevant tests or docs are updated.
